latin: Napoleon in colle stabat et campum Waterloo inspiciebat. exercitus eius fessus erat sed adhuc pugnavit. cum Prussiani advenerunt, omnia mutata sunt. imperator magnus ultima pugna victus est.
translation: Napoleon stood on a hill and surveyed the field of Waterloo. His army was exhausted but still fought. When the Prussians arrived, everything changed. The great emperor was defeated in his last battle.
